theme: Dark/Light mixed (Primarily Dark Graphite with Signal Amber accents)
archetype: 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) combined with Industrial/Luxury material feel

typography.heading_strategy: Tight tracking (-0.02em to -0.04em) on headings, bold/black weights for H1, regular/medium for body. Avoid centering text unless it's a specific short badge.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl font-semibold tracking-tighter leading-[1.05]

hero.layout: Grid split layout. Left side: overline, H1, description, CTA buttons. Right side: industrial imagery with overlapping stat cards.
hero.background: Deep graphite (neutral-950) with subtle grid overlay (bg-[linear-gradient(to_right,#80808012_1px,transparent_1px),linear-gradient(to_bottom,#80808012_1px,transparent_1px)] bg-[size:24px_24px]).

service_card.layout: Border-collapse bento grid or pure technical border boxes. Sharp corners (rounded-none). Left-aligned content. Icon on top, title, and descriptive text. On hover: subtle primary glow or inner border highlight.

industry_card.layout: Image background with dark gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-t from-black/80 to-transparent). Title at bottom. On hover, image scales up slightly. Sharp corners.

product_card.layout: White or off-white background (if inside light section). Image at top with industrial gray background, details below. Distinct 'Request Quote' technical button.

mega_menu.layout: Full width dropdown with grid layout inside. Links grouped by category. Transparent on load (if top is hero), transitions to solid bg-neutral-950/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-neutral-800 on scroll.

buttons.primary: bg-primary-500 text-white hover:bg-primary-600 uppercase tracking-widest text-sm font-semibold transition-colors duration-300 px-8 py-4
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-neutral-700 text-white hover:border-primary-500 hover:text-primary-500 uppercase tracking-widest text-sm font-semibold transition-colors px-8 py-4

motion.scroll_reveal: Use framer-motion for slight vertical translation (y: 20 -> 0) and opacity fade in. Stagger children for lists/grids.
motion.hover_states: Quick transitions (duration-200) for borders and colors. Subtle scales (scale-105) for images inside overflow-hidden containers.
motion.parallax: Subtle parallax on hero images and large background industrial images to create depth.

visual_enhancers.textures: Use noise texture overlay on dark sections.
visual_enhancers.lines: Use 1px horizontal/vertical lines (bg-neutral-800) to separate sections or act as container borders (technical schematic feel).
visual_enhancers.glows: Use soft radial glows behind key tech elements, e.g., a massive soft primary glow bg-primary-500/10 blur-[100px] behind the hero image.

accessibility_notes: Ensure text contrast on dark backgrounds using neutral-300/400. Ensure primary orange (#F55B14) is only used as an accent or background for white/black text if it passes contrast. Use white text over orange for buttons. Avoid pure black #000000, use #0A0D14. Always add aria-labels to buttons and links.
